description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->1sec].
For [7 sec->5sec], your Physical Block Chance is increased by [200->800]. When you block, deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by 25%.

For [8 sec->5sec], increases all allies’ Physical Block Chance by 400 and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to status ailments. When you block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by [7%->8%] and deals Physical DMG to the attacker. [(removed) stun them for 0.4 sec]. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing Physical DMG and stuns them for [2.5 sec->1sec]. [(removed) all allies’ Physical Damage taken is reduced by 20%]
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense and Physical Block Chance by [250->120].

IV.unified: Cooldown is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) Reduces the Physical Defense of pulled enemies by 30% for 5 sec.]

dark.unified: Mana cost is reduced by 1000. [(removed) cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.]

light.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [24%->15%] for [7 sec->5 sec].

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by 30% for 5 sec. [(removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 6 sec.]
Physical Defense increase amount increases by [30%->50%]. [(removed) Physical Block Chance is increased by 75.]

light.unified: Physical Block Chance increases by 120. [(removed) Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 250.]

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [25%->15%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [50%->24%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec.

Deals Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by [10%->4%] for [6 sec->15sec]. This ATK increase effect stacks up to [5->6] times. [(removed) reduces the target's Attack by 20%]

dark.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [100->400] and raises the target’s P.DMG taken by {0}% for 5 sec.
